name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Tampa's Western Union Money Order Only at 17621 Bruce B Downs Blvd is open 24 hours for cash and money order services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 17621 Bruce B Downs Blvd is a standalone financial services location in Tampa, FL, operating 24 hours a day, seven days a week. This Tampa-area branch provides round-the-clock access to money order services, making it convenient for residents who need to send funds at unusual hours.

At this Tampa location on Bruce B Downs Boulevard, you can send money orders, cash checks, and access other essential money transfer services. Contact the branch directly at +1 813-971-0694 to verify available services or ask about current fees and processing options.

When visiting this Western Union Money Order Only branch in Tampa, bring a valid government-issued photo ID and any funds you plan to send. This 24-hour standalone facility on Bruce B Downs Blvd is ideal for anyone in Tampa needing reliable money order services at night or on weekends.
address: 17621 Bruce B Downs Blvd, Tampa, FL 33647

company_info.headquarters: 17621 Bruce B Downs Blvd, Tampa, FL 33647

pros: Extensive physical network with 1,850+ agent locations across the US, including Walmart and major grocery chains
Online registration option allows customers to initiate transfers digitally before visiting a location to pay and finalize
Money orders available as a check alternative at participating locations, with ability to cash or deposit into bank accounts
Bill payment services for utilities, rent, and car payments available at participating agent locations
Fast cash pickup at participating locations using Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) and valid ID
Accepts multiple payment methods including cash, debit cards, and credit cards at select locations
Established 170-year history with emphasis on encryption and fraud prevention for transaction security
cons: Limited online transparency—actual fees and rates not displayed on website; users directed to cost calculator
Requires in-person visit to complete transactions; no fully online option for cash-based transfers
Does not provide currency exchange services at physical agent locations despite offering international transfers
Payment method availability varies by location (credit cards only at 'select locations'), requiring advance verification
Service hours depend entirely on host location (Walmart, retail store, bank partner), limiting consistency and accessibility
best_for: Underbanked consumers without access to traditional banks who need in-person money transfer and bill payment services
International remittance senders who want to conduct transactions in person with assistance rather than online
Individuals seeking to purchase and cash money orders as alternatives to checks at convenient retail locations
Customers who prefer digital initiation but want to pay cash in-person to avoid online payment methods
diagnosis: Western Union is best for underbanked and international customers who prefer in-person, human-assisted money transfers and bill payments over purely digital platforms. The main caveat is that despite offering online registration, all transactions ultimately require a physical visit to an agent location, and pricing information requires using their cost calculator rather than being displayed transparently on the website.
services: In-person domestic money transfers at agent locations
In-person international money transfers with exchange rate conversion
Money order purchase at participating locations
Money order cashing at participating locations
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating agent locations
Cash pickup for transferred funds using MTCN and valid ID
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card option for fund receipt with no minimum balance or credit check
Online transfer registration through website or mobile app
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) tracking and confirmation
Mobile app download for initiating transfers
Bank partner services at select financial institutions
Retail location services at Walmart and major grocery chains
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 17621 Bruce B Downs Blvd, Tampa, FL. Open 24 hours for fast money order services.
